Scene - Producer Intervention

Jasko Fide

Descriptions

Everyone knew Kara (Kali Sudhra) had a crush on their producer, Jamie (Jasko Fide). Everyone except Jamie, apparently. Determined to help, Mylo (Marcus Quillan) created a trail of arrows leading them into a candlelit bubble bath. What began as a playful mystery soon became something far more personal, as lingering glances, honest conversation, and undeniable chemistry finally gave way to a night neither woman would forget.
